title: スプリンターズSの後に・次のカワイイ

text_block_list.text: After the race...

Curren Chan has successfully defeated her
biggest opponent, Nishino Flower. However, she
doesn't look particularly happy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm happy. But... it's not like I was the
only one who was super cute out there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I just can't get over how well Flower captivated
the audience.
choice_data_list: Even though you won through your own skills?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's not what this is about.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I guess I've still got a long way to becoming the
very cutest...

It was a good race, but Curren Chan doesn't seem
satisfied. In that case...
choice_data_list: You just have to shine even more next time.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'm not done yet. I'll captivate
everyone even more at my next big race!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I've gotta run another G1!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I've gotta run another G1!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Looks like I lost.

Curren Chan ran a great race, but Nishino Flower
showed greater skill. I'm worried she's going to be
upset about the results, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hehe. Hehehehe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, Big Bro. I'm perfectly okay.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, Big Sis. I'm perfectly okay.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not reading your mind! You're just too
easy to read! But enough about that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not reading your mind! You're just too
easy to read! But enough about that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I feel great right now. Today's loss only proves...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I can still get cuter!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think that's amazing? Hehe... This is
starting to get fun!

Despite her sweet smile, but I can see the flames
burning in her eyes... I should use this opportunity
to kindle her competitive spirit even more.
choice_data_list:
You know what would make you even cuter? A
sweet comeback race.

You know what would make you even cuter? A
sweet comeback race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I'm only gonna cuter from here on
out!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I've gotta run another G1!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I've gotta run another G1!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a racing goal? Hmmm... I don't really have
one!

When I think back to when we first met, I can feel
how much Curren Chan's motivation toward
racing has grown.

In that case, as her trainer, I've got no choice but
to meet her newfound desire with a big race
proposal!
choice_data_list:
Then let's make your next big goal the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

Then let's make your next big goal the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

text_block_list.text:
The Takamatsunomiya Kinen is a G1 sprint race
that matches today's race pound for pound in
prominence. As a sprinter, she'll definitely want to
win it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is it okay if I announce it as my next goal
right away?

The Ocean Stakes is often called the prelude to
the Takamatsunomiya Kinen. I tell her that I want
her to win there and keep the momentum going.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Okay. ♪ Then, how about this?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#OceanStakes #MyNextRace #CheerForMe ♪
#SeeYouThere #CuteCurrenChan"
It's decided—our next goal is the Ocean Stakes!

With our goal now set, we leave the course in
high spirits. But something comes up as we're
heading home...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um, Big Bro? Take a look at this...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um, Big Sis? Take a look a this...

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text: Curren Chaaaaan! Look over here!

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text:
Hey... Don't push me! I can't see Curren!
You there! Get your camera outta the way!

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text: Murmur, murmur... Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
They're louder than the roar before a race... It's
like a small riot.
choice_data_list:
I wonder if this is also because of the
promotional stuff you've been doing.

text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan has been continuously growing her
fanbase by tying her self-promotion to her races.

Considering we've finished the G1 Sprinters
Stakes, I'm not surprised to see her promotion
having a bigger effect than usual, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If only it were that simple.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Um, excuse me? You there! ♪

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? M-me?! Wow! You're even cuter in person!
Are you really real?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehe, I'm a hundred percent real! ♪ It looks like
I've gotten super popular... Do you happen to
know why?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Besides that I'm cute. ♪

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Why?! B-because of Umatter, right?! You're
trending right now!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I see. So that's what it is...

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
I just became your fan today! And I already
followed you on everything! You're just sooo
cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank you. ♪ I hope you'll keep cheering for me!

text_block_list.name: Townspeople
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaah!
Cute Curren Chan!

Curren Chan speaks with authority—or at least
authoritative cuteness—and gets everyone to go
home.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I figured it out. It's because of Flower.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I figured it out. It's because of Flower.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but in an indirect sorta way... It's faster if
you just look.

Curren Chan shows me her phone, where I see her
name and variations of it dominating the trending
list on Umatter. Not only that...

"Age? Salary? Boyfriend? Find out everything you
want to know about the popular Curren Chan
here!"

Tons of articles like this are popping up
everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Looks like my popularity jumped waaay up on
Umatter after running against the ever-popular
Bento Fairy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, I think I know what I wanna do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey, I think I know what I wanna do.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I see now how I should fight and what I have to
show everyone going forward...

What exactly is Curren Chan fighting? Does it
have anything to do with racing?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
First, I'll have to uncover... Tracen Academy's...
And then...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I think I can see it—a future where I've
mastered cuteness. ♪

Feeling a new surge of cuteness from Curren
Chan, I think about what I can do in preparation
for the Ocean Stakes.
